english: Can India achieve its climate target of reducing carbon emissions by 45% by 2030 compared to 2015 levels?
hindi: भारत 2030 तक 2015 के स्तर की तुलना में कार्बन उत्सर्जन को 45% तक कम करने के अपने जलवायु लक्ष्य को प्राप्त कर सकता है?
tamil: இந்தியா 2030 இல் 2015 அளவில் கார்பன் உமிழ்வை 45% குறைக்க வேண்டும் என்று தனது காலநிலை லட்சியத்தை அடையலாமா?
vietnamese: Ấn Độ có thể đạt được mục tiêu khí hậu của mình là giảm khí thải carbon 45% vào năm 2030 so với mức 2015?
correct_answer: It is highly challenging due to the country's rapid industrialization and population growth, but the government has implemented various policies and initiatives to support the transition to a low-carbon economy.
expected_failure: Lack of sufficient data on India's historical carbon emissions, limited access to clean energy technologies, and the need for significant investment in renewable energy infrastructure.
